{{Infobox madra
| name = Flowing Flame madra
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Flowing Flame madra]] is a type of [[madra]] used by [[Ekerinatoth]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Flowing Flame madra]] is associated with the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara used [[Flowing Flame madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
